subject: Geography
title: Floating Cities
description: A micro-lesson that makes Floating Cities usable.

hook.text: The Maldives is building a floating city for 20,000 people to escape rising seas.

buildup.text: Hexagonal platforms linked together will float in a lagoon, rising with the tide.

discovery.text: Coral will be grown underneath to create artificial reefs and stabilize the structures.

twist.text: South Korea, the Netherlands, and Panama are all testing floating neighborhood prototypes.

climax.text: If seas keep rising, floating cities may shift from novelty to necessity.

punchline.text: When the land disappears, the city learns to float.

quiz.question: Why is the Maldives building a floating city?
